WESTERFIELD vs. USF [SFSC #CGC 03-417577] — [Proposed] ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER TO
FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT
G:\Client\101 USF\015 Westerfield\Pleadings\DemurrerFAC\Order.ple.dac

 
1 The demurrer by all defendants to Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint was heard on
2 ||September 4, 2003 at 9:30 a.m. before the Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. Michael J.
3 || Vartain of Vartain Law Group appeared on behalf of defendants, Trustees of the University of
4 ||San Francisco, University of San Francisco, B J Johnson, Dena Davis and Nicole Bohn. Kelly
5 || Armstrong of the Law Offices of Waukeen Q. McCoy appeared on behalf of plaintiff, Patricia
6 || Westerfield. Having considered all papers in support of and in opposition to defendants’
7 || demurrer and having heard and considered oral argument, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED:
8 DEMURRER BY INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS
9 1. The demurrer by the individual defendants, B J Johnson, Dena Davis, and Nicole
10 || Bohn is sustained WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND to plaintiffs Third and Fourth Causes of
11 || Action sounding in contract of employment.
12 . 2. The individual defendants’ demurrer to the Second Cause of Action, “Retaliation
13 || In Violation of Public Policy for Plaintiff's Exercise of Academic Concern,” is sustained WITH
14 ||LEAVE TO AMEND THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION, because individual managerial
15 || employees cannot be held personally liable in tort for personnel actions by an employer.
16 DEMURRER BY ALL DEFENDANTS TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION
17 3. Defendants’ demurrer to plaintiff's Second Cause of Action “Retaliation In
18 || Violation of Public Policy for Plaintiff's Exercise of Academic Concern” is sustained WITH
19 ||LEAVE TO AMEND THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION.
20 4. Defendants’ demurrer to plaintiff's Second Cause of Action “Retaliation in
21 || Violation of Public Policy for Plaintiff's Exercise of Academic Concern,” is sustained WITH
22 ||LEAVE TO AMEND THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION.
23 5. Plaintiff is granted leave to file amend the Second Cause of Action, in a manner
24 |\in conformity with this Order, within fifteen (15) days of service of this Order.
25 IT IS SO ORDERED.
26 || DATED: 2 | 4/%? | E ah 1)
